text.title: Array Items Wrapper Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is cardinality variable (zero, one, or many entities expected)?

conclusion.verdict: Use fixed-length tuple type — wrap unnecessary.
Wrap with `{items[], total_found, truncated}`. Strict-mode requires object root.

branch.when: variable_cardinality == true AND strict_required == false AND streaming_ui == true

conclusion.verdict: Stream top-level array; trade strict-mode benefits for streaming render.

branch.when: variable_cardinality == true AND strict_required == false AND streaming_ui == false

conclusion.verdict: Wrap. Shape stability outweighs the minor cost when no streaming.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
